title: FastTravelDimension
description:
Adds a special device that allows you to quickly switch between End-Nether-Earth dimensions 

(and alpha dimension... only for 1.20.1)
body:
Are you ready to revolutionize your Minecraft experience? _The Dimension Breakers_ Mod adds an exciting way to traverse between dimensions and even introduces a brand-new, custom dimension! Perfect for explorers, builders, and adventurers, this mod is designed to enhance your journey through the Minecraft universe.


<details>
  
**Key Features**
5 Unique Dimension Breaker Modes:

_Off_: Neutral state, no teleportation.
_Overworld_: Instantly return to the Overworld from any other dimension.
_Nether_: Quickly travel to the Nether dimension.
_End_: Direct access to the End dimension.
_Alpha_: Explore the new, custom Alpha dimension, exclusive to this mod!

**_The Alpha Dimension_**:
A dark, mysterious space made entirely of unbreakable black blocks.
Completely safe—no mobs spawn here.
Perfect for creating hidden bases or secret projects.
Immerse yourself in a unique ambiance with custom background music.

</details>



**craft the "OFF" dimension breaker**
First, craft _heavy whell_
![heavy whell recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a17b2ff3228e6acc4dbc2af23596e3cfbd41663d.png)
After that, craft _Dimension Breaker_ (version- Off)
![Dimension Breaker Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d55cc5edfede890b66d0e62ae982af58113f5f9.png)






****Crafting System**:**
Transform any Dimension Breaker to a specific dimension by pairing it with the following blocks in the crafting table:

**_Grass Block: Overworld_**
![Dimension Breaker (Overworld) recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cf50c2407de524dde546adbfbbb2e6db358cdd1.png)

**_Netherrack: Nether_**
![Dimension Breaker(Nether) Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9aeeeb0b66223b469c9f47fd51946536dd278ef2.png)

**_End Stone: End_**
![Dimension Breaker (End) recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85ddcc38cfdb291f837ca60c6891b45aedbbd01e.png)

**_Crying Obsidian: Alpha_**
![Dimension Breaker (Alpha) recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0da3c9e320ed52df18c89a7a485be58a5851a5a5.png)


**Enhanced Travel Experience**:
Gain Slow Falling effect upon entering a dimension, ensuring a safe and smooth landing every time.

**Download Now and Start Exploring!**
Don’t miss out on this opportunity to take your Minecraft world to the next level. Download the Dimension Breakers Mod today and experience the thrill of seamless dimension hopping! 🌌

**_Showcase video:_**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/GgXswpuZy10" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
